title: JupyterLab Plugin Setting
description: Schema for a JupyterLab plugin setting document returned from the settings REST API.

raw.description: Raw JSON5 settings document submitted by the user.

schema.description: JSON Schema describing valid settings for the plugin.

settings.description: Effective settings, merged from the user values and the schema defaults.

version.description: Plugin version associated with the schema.

last_modified.description: Timestamp the setting was last modified.

created.description: Timestamp the setting was first created.
